controls.title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
controls.check_text: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.
controls.fix_text: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.
references: VulnDiscussion: Audit policy gaps reduce investigation quality and may require updated evidence exports.

controls.title: Linux SSH banner must be configured
controls.check_text: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.
controls.fix_text: Configure the sshd Banner directive in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.

controls.title: Firewall management access must be restricted
controls.check_text: Review firewall management network restrictions and approved admin source ranges.
controls.fix_text: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
